name: Safhat Template Framework
description: Generic starter framework for building Safhat templates. It includes common sections, reusable field types, validation examples, conditional visibility, lists, repeaters, media, colors, typography, and interactive feature blocks.

feelings.title: Interactive Messages
feelings.description: Generic message submission block. Can be used for feelings, guestbook, feedback, testimonials, wishes, or comments.

rsvp.title: Visitor Response
rsvp.description: Generic response block. Can be used for RSVP, voting, booking interest, confirmation, or selection.

fields.label: وصف قسم المحتوى
fields.defaultValue: Use this starter to understand how each section connects with fields, repeaters, lists, validation rules, and design controls.

defaultValue.title: Fields
defaultValue.description: Text, textarea, image, color, select, list, repeater, URL, date, time, and more.

defaultValue.title: Sections
defaultValue.description: Every editable block has data-section so the builder can target it easily.

defaultValue.title: Validation
defaultValue.description: Each field can support required, length, pattern, visibility, and custom messages.

fields.defaultValue: This section can become projects, services, products, portfolio items, packages, or articles.

defaultValue.title: Reusable Card
defaultValue.description: Use this card for any repeated content.

defaultValue.title: Flexible Layout
defaultValue.description: Replace the content and use it in another template.

defaultValue.title: Builder Ready
defaultValue.description: Selectors are clean and easy to control.
